name: IRC_APPLICANT_SCORES
description: This table captures the different scores calculated by the AI engine for a candidate who is an applicant of a requisition.

columns.Name: APPLICANT_SCORE_ID
columns.Comments: A unique key generated by system for each row that acts as a Primary Key for the table

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the context ORA_SUBMISSION or ORA_PROSPECT.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Requisition id of the respective submission/prospect. Foreign key to irc_requisitions_b table.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Candidate person id of the submission/prospect. Foreign key to per_persons table.

columns.Name: PROFILE_AI_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching profile score of the candidate for the given requisition.

columns.Name: EXPERIENCE_AI_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching Experience score of the candidate for the given requisition.

columns.Name: EDUCATION_AI_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching Education score of the candidate for the given requisition.

columns.Name: SKILLS_AI_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching Skills score of the candidate for the given requisition.

columns.Name: OVERALL_SCORE
columns.Comments: Overall matching score of the candidate for the given requisition.

columns.Name: PROFILE_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: Matching profile summary of the candidate for the given requisition.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
